code:
import io
import string
import list

let input = io.read_to_end()
mut tokens: List<Int> = []
mut cur = ""
mut i = 0
let n = string.len(input)
while i < n
  match string.byte_at(input, i)
  when Some(c)
    if c == 32 or c == 9 or c == 10 or c == 13
      if string.len(cur) > 0
        match string.parse_int(cur)
        when Some(v)
          tokens = list.push(tokens, v)
        when None
          ()
        end
        cur = ""
      end
    else
      cur = "#{cur}#{string.from_byte(c)}"
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end
if string.len(cur) > 0
  match string.parse_int(cur)
  when Some(v)
    tokens = list.push(tokens, v)
  when None
    ()
  end
end

let a = match tokens.get(0)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
let b = match tokens.get(1)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
let s = match tokens.get(2)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    1
  end

mut out = ""
mut cur_val = a
mut first = true
while cur_val < b
  if first
    out = "#{cur_val}"
    first = false
  else
    out = "#{out} #{cur_val}"
  end
  cur_val = cur_val + s
end
println(out)
